recoverPassword.title: Recover password
recoverPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a recovery link.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Complete the form to request access

sidebar.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to log out of your session?

dashboard.welcome: Welcome! What do you want to do today?
dashboard.subtitle: <1>Adverse Human Behaviours</1> detection platform

newProject.title: New project
newProject.desc: Set up a new analysis environment, import datasets and detect <1>Adverse Human Behaviours</1>

newEntry.title: New entry
newEntry.desc: Add entries to projects to detect <1>Adverse Human Behaviours</1> on them, using different AI models

newForm.title: Generate subproject analysis
newForm.description: Configure how you want to derive high-level metrics and insights for this model. You can apply entry exclusions directly from this screen.
newForm.entriesExcluded: {{count}} entries currently excluded. Click to modify.
newForm.noExclusions: No exclusions applied. Click to select entries to ignore.
newForm.filteredDesc: Analysis will run on the selected subset of entries.
newForm.completeDesc: Analysis will run on all available entries in the subproject.
newForm.guideExcludeDesc: Use the entries table filters to identify outlier data points or test cases you want to ignore to ensure your charts accurately reflect true performance.
newForm.guideHistoryDesc: Every analysis is saved. You can always come back and re-download the PDF report or view the visual insights as they were when they were generated.

historyTable.title: Recent analysis history
historyTable.noHistory: No history found for this subproject.
historyTable.info: Analysis history is kept per subproject. You can generate multiple reports with different exclusion criteria to compare results. Analysis runs typically take a few seconds to process.

new.title: New project
new.subtitle: Create a new text analysis environment.
new.name: Project name
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the analysis goals...
new.behaviorsDesc: Select the <1>Adverse Human Behaviours</1> you'd like to detect in the dataset
new.modelsDesc: A new subproject will be generated for each selected model. Note: Models are dynamically filtered to only show those compatible with all selected <1>Adverse Human Behaviours</1>.
new.noModelsIntersection: No models available for the selected combination of behaviors.
new.selectBehaviorFirst: Select at least one behavior to view available models.

view.subprojectsDesc: Explore the different models applied to this project. Select a subproject to access its specific dataset, evaluate individual predictions, and manage the filtered results.
view.emptyModels: No ML models were configured for this project.
view.deleteProjectDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the project "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently delete all associated entries and subprojects.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.deleteWarning: Once you delete a project, there is no going back. All associated subprojects and entries will be removed. Please be certain.

entries.title: Analyzed entries
entries.desc: View an overarching analysis of your imported corpus data below. Review detailed confidence metrics or filter rows by inferred label values.
entries.noResults: No entries found matching the filters.
entries.deleteEntryDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? This action cannot be undone.

new.title: Add entries
new.subtitle: Import data to project "{{name}}" for analysis.
new.subtitleGlobal: Select a configuration below to import data into your workspace.
new.placeholder: Enter the text to be analyzed (e.g., a tweet or post)...
new.dropzoneSubtitle: or click to browse your files
new.csvInstruction1: The file must be in .csv format.
new.csvInstruction2: It MUST contain a column named "text" (case insensitive).
new.csvInstruction3: Use the template to see all supported fields for this configuration.
new.successDesc: Successfully added {{count}} entries to the project.

targetConfiguration.title: Configuration
targetConfiguration.noSubprojectsError: You must select at least one subproject.

interactiveForm.title: X (INTERACTIVE FORM)
interactiveForm.isResponse: This tweet is a reply to another tweet
interactiveForm.isQuoteAResponse: This tweet is a reply to another tweet
interactiveForm.quotedPlaceholder: Enter the text of the quoted tweet...
interactiveForm.placeholder: Enter the text to be analyzed...
